p with rightwards arrow on top space equals space minus 2 i with rightwards arrow on top space plus space 2 j with rightwards arrow on top space plus space 2 k with rightwards arrow on top comma space q with rightwards arrow on top space equals space i with rightwards arrow on top space minus space 2 j with rightwards arrow on top space plus space 3 k with rightwards arrow on top comma space d a n space r with rightwards arrow on top space equals space minus 3 i with rightwards arrow on top space minus space 4 j with rightwards arrow on top space minus space 2 k with rightwards arrow on top
